task_completion.description: Verify 'Discard old builds' is enabled for the 'nightly-integration-tests' job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jenkins job configuration page for 'nightly-integration-tests' (visible in the breadcrumb or title). The 'Discard old builds' checkbox must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Log Rotation values are set for 'nightly-integration-tests'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Discard old builds', 'Max # of builds to keep' should be 5, and 'Max # of builds to keep with artifacts' should be 2. 'Days to keep builds' and 'Days to keep artifacts' must be left blank.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Discard old builds' is enabled for the 'feature-branch-builds' job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jenkins job configuration page for 'feature-branch-builds' (visible in the breadcrumb or title). The 'Discard old builds' checkbox must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Log Rotation values are set for 'feature-branch-builds'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Discard old builds', 'Days to keep builds' should be 7. 'Max # of builds to keep', 'Days to keep artifacts', and 'Max # of builds to keep with artifacts' must be left blank.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Discard old builds' is enabled for the 'release-pipeline' job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jenkins job configuration page for 'release-pipeline' (visible in the breadcrumb or title). The 'Discard old builds' checkbox must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Log Rotation values are set for 'release-pipeline'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Discard old builds', 'Max # of builds to keep' should be 10, and 'Max # of builds to keep with artifacts' should be 5. 'Days to keep builds' and 'Days to keep artifacts' must be left blank.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jenkins web UI to configure the jobs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Jenkins web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, API calls, or directly editing XML files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jenkins application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should display the genuine Jenkins UI with the correct URL (typically localhost or a local IP on a specific port like 8080), not a mock interface or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify unrelated settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should only be seen modifying the 'Discard old builds' section. Other job configuration sections should remain untouched.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Jenkins LogRotator fields map as follows: 'Days to keep builds' (daysToKeep), 'Max # of builds to keep' (numToKeep), 'Days to keep artifacts' (artifactDaysToKeep), 'Max # of builds to keep with artifacts' (artifactNumToKeep). A blank field in the UI corresponds to '-1' (not set) in the backend. Expected configurations: 1) nightly-integration-tests: numToKeep=5, artifactNumToKeep=2, others blank. 2) feature-branch-builds: daysToKeep=7, others blank. 3) release-pipeline: numToKeep=10, artifactNumToKeep=5, others blank.
